generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw a local civil defense drill in my town. It was impressive how organized they were, but honestly, I was surprised how many people didn't know about it. We need to do better at preparing our communities. Remember the 2024 power grid incident? That could've been much worse if people weren't ready. #CommunityPreparedness #NationalSecurity
